description: A love-forever classic, this murcia sling bag is a closet essential. Perfect for colour blocking and mix-and-match ensembles, make this piece your go-to essential to add a fresh twist to off-duty staples. Height:29cm Width: 35cm Depth: 10cm Leatherette upper for durability Two main compartments with a zippered pocket and a mobile pouch Two short handles Zippered pocket on the back Brand badge appliqued on the front Adjustable leatherette straps with buckle design on either side Bag care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
